data.change_summary: Hardened retry policy to prevent runs from exiting on transient backend failures. Increased retry limits (TransportFailure 3→5, SchemaValidationFailure 2→3, Timeout 2→3), added hard timeout enforcement on backend process invocations via tokio::time::timeout wrapping spawn_and_wait, introduced BinaryNotFound failure class for non-retryable exit code 127 and spawn NotFound errors, and added exponential backoff (5s base, 60s cap) between retry attempts with configurable policy support.
outstanding_risks: The tokio test-util feature is now enabled unconditionally (not just for tests) since Cargo.toml uses a single dependency spec; this adds a small amount of compiled code but has no runtime impact

Backoff delays in production retry loops add 5-60s per retry attempt; in pathological cases (5 retries × 60s cap) this adds up to ~2.5 min of delay before exhaustion, which is acceptable but operators should be aware
The timeout enforcement wraps the entire I/O+wait block including stdin write; if stdin write itself is slow (very large prompts), the timeout budget is shared with the actual execution time

steps.description: Increased retry limits in retry_policy.rs: TransportFailure 3→5, SchemaValidationFailure 2→3, Timeout 2→3

Added hard timeout enforcement in process_backend.rs spawn_and_wait by wrapping I/O+wait in tokio::time::timeout using request.timeout, killing child on expiry via spawn_background_reap and returning FailureClass::Timeout

Added BinaryNotFound variant to FailureClass enum (domain.rs) with terminal retry rule, classified spawn ErrorKind::NotFound and exit code 127 as BinaryNotFound via new classify_exit_failure helper in process_backend.rs
Added configurable exponential backoff to RetryPolicy (backoff_base=5s, backoff_cap=60s, with_no_backoff() for tests) and integrated into engine.rs retry loop via retry_policy.backoff_for_attempt()
Updated retry_policy_test.rs assertions for new limits and BinaryNotFound, added backoff_for_attempt and with_no_backoff tests
Updated workflow_engine_test.rs retry_exhaustion test from 3→5 transient failures, added start_paused=true to 4 retry-related tests to avoid real backoff delays
Added tokio test-util feature to Cargo.toml for start_paused support
Verified all 677 tests pass, cargo clippy -D warnings clean, cargo fmt --check clean

validation_evidence: cargo clippy -- -D warnings: no warnings or errors
New test spawn_and_wait_timeout_returns_timeout_failure verifies timeout enforcement kills child and returns FailureClass::Timeout
New test exit_code_127_returns_binary_not_found verifies exit 127 is classified as BinaryNotFound
New test no_backoff_returns_zero_for_all_attempts verifies with_no_backoff disables delays
Updated retry_exhaustion test now validates 5 attempts with will_retry true for first 4, false for 5th
